# TaskFlow — Backend Blueprint

**Project:** TaskFlow — Collaborative Project Management API  
**Stack:** Go 1.22 · Gin · PostgreSQL 16 · Redis 7 · Tigris (S3) · Fly.io  
**Generated by:** Backend Integrator Agent  
**Playbooks applied:** auth.md · rate-limiting.md · security.md · observability.md · realtime.md · file-storage.md · resilience.md

---

## 1. Entities & Schema

### User
| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| id | UUID (PK) | gen_random_uuid() |
| name | VARCHAR(100) | NOT NULL |
| email | VARCHAR(255) | UNIQUE NOT NULL — stored encrypted |
| email_hash | VARCHAR(64) | SHA-256 — for lookup without decrypting |
| password_hash | VARCHAR(255) | argon2id |
| avatar_url | TEXT | Tigris public URL |
| timezone | VARCHAR(80) | IANA zone name |
| created_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | DEFAULT NOW() |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | |

### Workspace
| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| id | UUID (PK) | |
| name | VARCHAR(80) | NOT NULL |
| description | TEXT | |
| owner_id | UUID (FK → users) | |
| created_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | |

### WorkspaceMember
| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| workspace_id | UUID (FK → workspaces) | PK composite |
| user_id | UUID (FK → users) | PK composite |
| role | ENUM(member, admin) | NOT NULL |
| joined_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | DEFAULT NOW() |

### WorkspaceInvite
| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| id | UUID (PK) | |
| workspace_id | UUID (FK → workspaces) | |
| email | VARCHAR(255) | invitee email |
| role | ENUM(member, admin) | |
| token_hash | VARCHAR(64) | HMAC-SHA256 of invite token |
| accepted | BOOLEAN | DEFAULT FALSE |
| expires_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | NOW() + 48h |
| created_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | |

### Board
| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| id | UUID (PK) | |
| workspace_id | UUID (FK → workspaces) | |
| name | VARCHAR(80) | NOT NULL |
| color | VARCHAR(7) | hex color #rrggbb |
| position | INTEGER | sort order within workspace |
| created_by | UUID (FK → users) | |
| created_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | |

### Task
| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| id | UUID (PK) | |
| board_id | UUID (FK → boards) | |
| title | VARCHAR(255) | NOT NULL |
| description | TEXT | |
| status | ENUM(todo, in_progress, done, archived) | DEFAULT 'todo' |
| priority | ENUM(low, medium, high, urgent) | DEFAULT 'medium' |
| assignee_id | UUID (FK → users) | NULLABLE |
| due_date | DATE | NULLABLE |
| position | FLOAT8 | lexicographic sort (LexoRank-style) |
| created_by | UUID (FK → users) | |
| created_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | |

### Label
| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| id | UUID (PK) | |
| workspace_id | UUID (FK → workspaces) | |
| name | VARCHAR(50) | |
| color | VARCHAR(7) | |

### TaskLabel (join)
| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| task_id | UUID (FK → tasks) | PK composite |
| label_id | UUID (FK → labels) | PK composite |

### Comment
| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| id | UUID (PK) | |
| task_id | UUID (FK → tasks) | |
| author_id | UUID (FK → users) | |
| body | TEXT | NOT NULL, max 5000 chars |
| created_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | |
| updated_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | |

### Attachment
| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| id | UUID (PK) | |
| task_id | UUID (FK → tasks) | |
| uploader_id | UUID (FK → users) | |
| filename | VARCHAR(255) | original filename |
| mime_type | VARCHAR(127) | |
| size_bytes | BIGINT | |
| storage_key | TEXT | Tigris object key |
| created_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | |

### RefreshToken
| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| id | UUID (PK) | |
| user_id | UUID (FK → users) | |
| token_hash | VARCHAR(64) | SHA-256 of token |
| expires_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | NOW() + 7d |
| revoked | BOOLEAN | DEFAULT FALSE |
| created_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | |

### ActivityEvent
| Field | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| id | UUID (PK) | |
| workspace_id | UUID (FK → workspaces) | |
| actor_id | UUID (FK → users) | |
| entity_type | VARCHAR(50) | task, board, workspace, comment |
| entity_id | UUID | |
| action | VARCHAR(50) | created, updated, deleted, commented |
| payload | JSONB | changed fields / summary |
| created_at | TIMESTAMPTZ | |

## 2. API Endpoints (28 total)

### Auth (6)
| Method | Path | Auth | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| POST | /api/auth/register | — | Create account |
| POST | /api/auth/login | — | Returns JWT + sets refresh cookie |
| POST | /api/auth/logout | JWT | Revokes refresh token |
| POST | /api/auth/refresh | Cookie | Rotate refresh token |
| POST | /api/auth/forgot-password | — | Send reset email |
| POST | /api/auth/reset-password | — | Consume signed reset token |

### Users (2)
| Method | Path | Auth | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| GET | /api/users/me | JWT | Current user profile |
| PATCH | /api/users/me | JWT | Update name, timezone |

### Workspaces (5)
| Method | Path | Auth | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| GET | /api/workspaces | JWT | List user's workspaces |
| POST | /api/workspaces | JWT | Create workspace |
| GET | /api/workspaces/:id | JWT + member | Workspace detail + boards |
| PATCH | /api/workspaces/:id | JWT + admin | Update workspace |
| DELETE | /api/workspaces/:id | JWT + admin | Delete workspace + cascade |

### Workspace Members & Invites (5)
| Method | Path | Auth | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| GET | /api/workspaces/:id/members | JWT + member | List members |
| PATCH | /api/workspaces/:id/members/:userId | JWT + admin | Change role |
| DELETE | /api/workspaces/:id/members/:userId | JWT + admin | Remove member |
| POST | /api/workspaces/:id/invites | JWT + admin | Send invite email |
| POST | /api/invites/:token/accept | JWT | Accept invite |

### Boards (4)
| Method | Path | Auth | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| POST | /api/workspaces/:id/boards | JWT + member | Create board |
| GET | /api/workspaces/:id/boards/:boardId | JWT + member | Board + tasks |
| PATCH | /api/workspaces/:id/boards/:boardId | JWT + member | Rename, recolor |
| DELETE | /api/workspaces/:id/boards/:boardId | JWT + admin | Delete board + tasks |

### Tasks (5)
| Method | Path | Auth | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| POST | /api/boards/:id/tasks | JWT + member | Create task |
| GET | /api/tasks/:id | JWT + member | Task detail |
| PATCH | /api/tasks/:id | JWT + member | Edit / move column |
| DELETE | /api/tasks/:id | JWT + member | Delete task |
| GET | /api/tasks/:id/comments | JWT + member | Paginated comments |

### Comments & Attachments (4)
| Method | Path | Auth | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| POST | /api/tasks/:id/comments | JWT + member | Add comment |
| DELETE | /api/comments/:id | JWT + author | Delete own comment |
| POST | /api/tasks/:id/attachments/presign | JWT + member | Get presigned S3 PUT URL |
| DELETE | /api/attachments/:id | JWT + member | Delete attachment + Tigris object |

### Activity & Health (3)
| Method | Path | Auth | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| GET | /api/workspaces/:id/activity | JWT + member | Paginated activity |
| GET | /api/workspaces/:id/activity/stream | JWT + member | SSE — live events |
| GET | /health/live | — | Liveness |
| GET | /health/ready | — | DB + Redis ping |

---

## 3. Security Architecture

### Authentication
- **JWT** access tokens — 15 min expiry, RS256 signed (`jwt-go/v5`)
- **Refresh tokens** — rotating, stored as SHA-256 hash in `refresh_tokens` table; delivered as `HttpOnly; Secure; SameSite=Strict` cookie
- **Invite tokens** — HMAC-SHA256 signed with `INVITE_SECRET`, 48h expiry
- **Reset tokens** — HMAC-SHA256 signed with `RESET_SECRET`, 30 min expiry, single-use

### Authorization — Gin Middleware Chain
```
Router
  └── RateLimitMiddleware (Redis sliding window)
       └── AuthMiddleware (JWT parse + inject user context)
            └── WorkspaceMemberMiddleware (member check)
                 └── WorkspaceAdminMiddleware (admin check — admin routes only)
```

### Email Encryption
- User `email` field stored encrypted: AES-256-GCM via `FIELD_ENCRYPTION_KEY` env var
- `email_hash` = SHA-256(email) — used for login lookup without decrypting all rows
- Raw email never logged; zerolog redact list includes `email`, `password`

### File Storage (Tigris)
- Backend generates presigned S3 PUT URLs (5 min expiry) — browser uploads directly
- `Content-Type` validated server-side against allowed MIME types
- `Content-Length` validated — max 25 MB (enforced at presign time via S3 policy)
- Signed GET URLs generated on demand (1h expiry)

### Rate Limits (Redis sliding window via `go-redis`)
| Scope | Limit |
|---|---|
| POST /api/auth/* | 10 req / 60s per IP |
| POST /api/workspaces/:id/invites | 5 req / 60s per user |
| POST /api/tasks/:id/comments | 30 req / 60s per user |
| Global | 300 req / 60s per IP |

---

## 4. Real-Time Architecture (SSE)

```
Client GET /api/workspaces/:id/activity/stream
  → Gin SSE handler (chunked transfer encoding)
  → Subscribe to Redis channel: activity:{workspaceId}
  → Loop: read from channel, write event to response writer
  → Flush on each event

Any write operation (task created/updated/deleted, comment added)
  → Persist to activity_events table
  → Publish JSON event to Redis channel: activity:{workspaceId}
  → All Fly.io regions receive via Redis pub/sub
```

**Multi-region note:** Redis is the fan-out mechanism. All Fly.io app instances (any region) subscribe to the same Redis channel — SSE works correctly in multi-region deployments without sticky sessions.

---

## 5. Observability

- **Structured logging:** `zerolog` — JSON output, request ID on every log line
- **Request ID:** `X-Request-ID` header injected by middleware; propagated to all log lines
- **Health endpoints:** `GET /health/live` (always 200) · `GET /health/ready` (DB + Redis ping)
- **Metrics:** Prometheus-compatible `/metrics` endpoint via `go-prometheus/client_golang`
- **Error tracking:** Sentry Go SDK — captures panics + unhandled errors; PII fields stripped

---

## 6. Resilience

- **Email (Resend):** HTTP client with 10s timeout; `p-retry`-equivalent Go retry (`github.com/avast/retry-go`): 3 attempts, exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s) + jitter
- **Redis:** Connection pool (10 max); circuit breaker wrapping rate-limit Redis calls — threshold 50%, 30s reset window using `gobreaker`
- **Tigris (S3):** AWS SDK retry with 3 attempts; exponential backoff built-in to SDK
- **Database:** pgx connection pool (max 20); query timeout 30s via context

---

## 7. Playbooks Applied
- `auth.md` — JWT + rotating refresh tokens + HMAC-signed invite/reset tokens
- `rate-limiting.md` — Redis sliding window, per-route limits
- `security.md` — AES-256-GCM email encryption, argon2id, secret scanning, CORS allowlist
- `observability.md` — zerolog, request IDs, /health endpoints, Prometheus metrics
- `realtime.md` — SSE via Go goroutines + Redis pub/sub fan-out (multi-region safe)
- `file-storage.md` — Presigned S3 PUT URLs, MIME validation, max size policy, signed GET URLs
- `resilience.md` — retry-go on email, gobreaker on Redis, pgx connection pool timeouts
